calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Title Of Trust Property
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Corlett appeared by telephone for with Andrew King (Trustee) present.

The Court stated that there is no general assignment, no schedule of assets and no pre-amble. Ms. Corlett stated that the trust was established decades ago and that the account was opened four months prior to Ms. Scudder's death with proceeds from an insurance for the deceased Husband. The Petition for Order Confirming Title of Trust Property is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
